actions.script: var el = document.querySelector('input#identifierId') || document.querySelector('input[name="identifier"]') || document.querySelector('input[type="email"]'); if (!el) { return 'email_field_not_found'; } var nativeSetter = Object.getOwnPropertyDescriptor(window.HTMLInputElement.prototype, 'value').set; nativeSetter.call(el, '${username}'); el.dispatchEvent(new Event('input', { bubbles: true })); el.dispatchEvent(new Event('change', { bubbles: true })); return 'email_entered';

var spans = document.querySelectorAll('span[jsname="V67aGc"]'); for (var i = 0; i < spans.length; i++) { if (spans[i].textContent.trim() === 'Next') { var btn = spans[i].closest('button'); if (btn) { btn.click(); return 'next_clicked'; } } } var btns = document.querySelectorAll('button'); for (var j = 0; j < btns.length; j++) { if (btns[j].textContent.trim() === 'Next' || btns[j].textContent.indexOf('Next') !== -1) { btns[j].click(); return 'next_clicked'; } } return 'next_button_not_found';

var el = document.querySelector('input[name="Passwd"]') || document.querySelector('input[type="password"]'); if (!el) { return 'password_field_not_found'; } var nativeSetter = Object.getOwnPropertyDescriptor(window.HTMLInputElement.prototype, 'value').set; nativeSetter.call(el, '${password}'); el.dispatchEvent(new Event('input', { bubbles: true })); el.dispatchEvent(new Event('change', { bubbles: true })); return 'password_entered';

var spans = document.querySelectorAll('span[jsname="V67aGc"]'); for (var i = 0; i < spans.length; i++) { if (spans[i].textContent.trim() === 'Next') { var btn = spans[i].closest('button'); if (btn) { btn.click(); return 'next_clicked'; } } } var btns = document.querySelectorAll('button'); for (var j = 0; j < btns.length; j++) { if (btns[j].textContent.trim() === 'Next' || btns[j].textContent.indexOf('Next') !== -1) { btns[j].click(); return 'next_clicked'; } } return 'next_button_not_found';

if (window.location.hostname.indexOf('myaccount.google.com') !== -1 || (window.location.hostname.indexOf('accounts.google.com') !== -1 && window.location.pathname.indexOf('signin') === -1 && document.querySelector('input#identifierId') === null && document.querySelector('input[name="Passwd"]') === null)) { return 'login_complete'; } return 'url:' + window.location.href;
